title: Make colour conditioning 'shareable' /Duplicable
excerpt: Where colour conditions are utilised, allow for specific ‘views’ to be saved, so that there can be multiple sets of colouring conditions, but also so that a view can be shared to other users. I have one board with 28 col…

posts.author: DBWhitespace (David Brennan)
posts.cookedHtml: Where colour conditions are utilised, allow for specific ‘views’ to be saved, so that there can be multiple sets of colouring conditions, but also so that a view can be shared to other users. I have one board with 28 colouring conditions over 10 columns which took 1 hour to do, I cannot fathom a colleague wanting to repeat the process.
